prompt: Hero frame, vertical 9:16 mobile ad still: a full-bleed screen capture of Helix Jump gameplay — a single glossy white sphere mid-bounce on a stacked cylindrical helix tower made of thin disc platforms in vibrant cyan #5CE1E6, with one platform segment glowing neon green #39FF14 as a safe gap and two segments marked in danger red #FF0000 as trap zones, central vertical axis pole, soft pastel light background, no characters, no human figures. Top-center HUD shows score multiplier text 'x3 MULTIPLIER' in bold white sans-serif. 3D minimalist with bright, contrasting colors and simple geometric shapes. Clean, energetic, competitive mobile-game UI chrome identical to Helix Jump screenshots.
